title: Slay the Streamer 2
description:
Twitch and YouTube chat votes on the streamer's choices: run start (act variant), Neow and mid-run Ancient blessings, card rewards, and act bosses. Inspired by Tempus's Slay the Streamer for StS1.

Configuration lives in %APPDATA%\SlayTheSpire2\slay_the_streamer_2.json and in the in-game Mods screen once connected.

Setup guide and README: https://github.com/Surfinite/slay-the-streamer-2

Demo: https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2782280062
changeNote: v0.2.0: Vote overrides - the streamer can overrule a running vote (default once per act) by clicking an option mid-countdown; works on card rewards and Ancient blessings, Skip mid-vote costs an override, and a 1.5s guard stops the opening double-click spending one by accident. Relic choices - treasure chests and elite kills can offer 2-4 relics; pick one, the rest return to the relic pool.
